title: Intense Pungent Turkish Purple Sprouting Broccoli Papillote
description: A light and pungent Turkish dish featuring purple sprouting broccoli, perfect for a sick day, with ayurvedic-rajasic-friendly ingredients. This recipe is easy to make and requires minimal ingredients.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
Cut the purple sprouting broccoli into florets and set aside.
In a small bowl, mix together olive oil, garlic, turkish red pepper flakes, lemon juice, salt, and black pepper.
Place a sheet of parchment paper on a flat surface and arrange a quarter of the broccoli florets in the center.
Drizzle a quarter of the olive oil mixture over the broccoli.
Fold the parchment paper over the broccoli to form a papillote and repeat with the remaining ingredients.
Place the papillotes on a baking sheet and bake for 15 minutes.
Remove the papillotes from the oven and let them cool for a few minutes before serving.
